name: AEI INCOME & GROWTH FUND XXII LTD PARTNERSHIP
business: AEI Income & Growth Fund XXII Limited Partnership acquires existing and newly constructed commercial properties in the United States, leases them under net leases to tenants, and holds them for eventual sale. The partnership owns commercial single-tenant buildings and is in the process of final liquidation by disposing of its assets. It has no direct employees and relies on an affiliate for management services.

exposures.sentence: The Partnership was organized to acquire existing and newly constructed commercial properties located in the United States, to lease such properties to tenants under net leases, to hold such properties and to eventually sell such properties.

catalysts.event: Expected rental income of approximately $420,000 in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Based on the scheduled rent for the properties owned as of February 28, 2026, the Partnership expects to recognize rental income of approximately $420,000 in 2026.
